task: Find Florida internship programs in the Mayo Clinic College of Medicine and Science.
final_result_response:
Based on my thorough review of the Mayo Clinic College of Medicine and Science Academics page (college.mayo.edu), filtering by **Campus location: Florida** and **Program type: Internship**, there are **24 Florida internship programs** in total:

1. **Administrative Internship Program (Florida)** – Duration: 1 semester | School: Non-Clinical Education
2. **Audiology Externship (Florida)** – Duration: 1 year | School: Health Sciences
3. **Biomedical Sciences International Internship (Florida)** – Duration: 1 year | School: Health Sciences
4. **Biostatistics and Data Science Internship Program (Florida)** – Duration: 1 semester | School: Non-Clinical Education
5. **Cardiovascular Medicine Exercise Physiology Internship (Florida)** – Duration: 12 weeks | School: Health Sciences
6. **Cardiovascular Technology Internship (Florida)** – Duration: 6 weeks | School: Health Sciences
7. **Clinical Research Coordinator Internship (Florida)** – Duration: 1 semester | School: Non-Clinical Education
8. **Clinical Research Internship Study Program** – Duration: 10 weeks | School: Non-Clinical Education
9. **Convergence Science Internship: Engineering (Florida)** – Duration: 16 weeks | School: Non-Clinical Education
10. **Dietetic Internship (Florida)** – Duration: 8 months | School: Health Sciences
11. **Echocardiography Internship (Florida)** – Duration: 6 weeks | School: Health Sciences
12. **FOUR Stroke Education Internship (Florida)** – Duration: 1 year | School: Non-Clinical Education
13. **Genetic Counseling Internship (Florida)** – Duration: 8-10 weeks | School: Health Sciences
14. **Health Information Management Internship (Arizona and Florida)** – Duration: Varies | School: Health Sciences
15. **Historical Archivist Internship (Florida and Minnesota)** – Duration: 1 semester | School: Non-Clinical Education
16. **Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI) Internship (Florida)** – Duration: 5 months | School: Health Sciences | Specialty: Radiology
17. **Mayo Clinic Physics, Chemistry, and Engineering Internship (Florida)** – Duration: 1 semester | School: Non-Clinical Education
18. **Physical or Occupational Therapy Internship (Florida)** – Duration: 8-12 weeks | School: Health Sciences
19. **Public Health Internship Program (Florida)** – Duration: 1 semester | School: Non-Clinical Education
20. **Social Work Internship (Florida)** – Duration: 1-2 semesters | School: Health Sciences
21. **Speech Language Pathology Internship (Florida)** – Duration: 1 semester | School: Health Sciences
22. **Speech Pathology Graduate Internship in Voice and Upper Airway (Florida)** – Duration: 1-2 semesters | School: Health Sciences
23. **Undergraduate Biomedical Research Internship (Florida)** – Duration: 2 semesters | School: Health Sciences
24. **Vascular Interventional Radiologic Technology Internship (Florida)** – Duration: 8 months | School: Health Sciences
